SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAUCEDA, MARCUS $2,343.50 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,389.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
